title: Three Auto-Graded Baseline Failures For Transmute Search
selection_notes: This is the first frozen three-question benchmark for transmute-prompt iteration. It uses the currently auto-graded questions where the existing baseline grading history shows failure, so prompt changes can be measured immediately.

questions.why_included: Exact numeric answer with a multi-step mathematical derivation.
Exact numeric answer in a counting/expectation setting.
Tolerance-graded scientific computation with a known sign trap.
